global_description: Elegant flowering plant with long, slender stems and intricate blooms. The flowers are often vibrant, with colors ranging from white and pink to purple and yellow. The petals are smooth and waxy, sometimes with unique patterns or spots. Orchids have a central column and a distinctive lip petal, adding to their exotic appearance.

part_details.stem: Long and slender, supporting the flowers
part_details.flower: Intricate with vibrant colors, smooth waxy petals
part_details.lip: Distinctive petal, often larger and differently shaped
part_details.column: Central part of the flower, unique to orchids

spatial_relations: Lip petal extends from the flower
Column located at the center of the flower
